## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 bullets or a short paragraph.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Citation or metadata fix
- [ ] Verification tooling
- [ ] Research text revision
- [ ] Translation sync
- [ ] Build or collaboration infrastructure

## Verification

- [ ] `python3 scripts/verify_references.py`
- [ ] `python3 scripts/verify_references.py --offline`
- [ ] `make pdf` or equivalent TeX build, if `latex/main.tex` changed
- [ ] I did not run some of the above, and I explained why below

## Translation Impact

- [ ] English and `zh-TW` files remain aligned
- [ ] Follow-up translation work is still needed and is described below

## Notes

List any unresolved manual-review items, new assumptions, or migration notes.
